Name: Great North Road – Kabwe Bypass Phase 1 Earthworks Complete
Description: Tokenised proof of completion for Phase 1 earthworks (25 km, Kabwe Bypass). Certified by ZNRA resident engineer and independent quality surveyor. Contract ZN-2023-KBP.

Name: Great North Road – Kabwe Bypass Phase 2 Sub-Base Complete
Description: Tokenised proof of completion for Phase 2 sub-base (granular material, 25 km). Contract ZN-2023-KBP. Certified by ZNRA and IDA supervising engineer.

Name: Great North Road – Kabwe Bypass Phase 3 Asphalt Surfacing Complete
Description: Tokenised proof of completion for Phase 3 double-chip asphalt surfacing, 25 km. Certified by ZNRA resident engineer. Contract ZN-2023-KBP.

Name: Lusaka–Ndola Dual Carriageway Bridge Delivery – Kafue River Bridge
Description: Tokenised delivery certificate for the Kafue River Bridge (4-lane, 280m span) on the Lusaka–Ndola Dual Carriageway. Structural completion and load testing certified by ZNRA and Arup consulting engineers.

Name: Lusaka–Ndola Dual Carriageway – Section A (0–42 km) Delivery
Description: Full section delivery certificate for 42 km dual carriageway, Lusaka to Chisamba. Includes drainage, guardrails, signage and road markings. Certified final acceptance by ZNRA.

Name: Kitwe–Chingola Road Rehabilitation – 58 km Road Delivery
Description: Delivery certificate for full rehabilitation of 58 km Kitwe–Chingola Road (D371). Includes pavement reconstruction, culverts, and storm drainage. ZNRA and Copperbelt Provincial Road Engineer sign-off.

Name: T002 Cairo Road Urban Section – Annual Pavement Condition Survey Certificate
Description: Annual pavement condition index (PCI) inspection certificate for the 18 km T002 Cairo Road urban section. Inspected by ZNRA Roads Department technical team. PCI score: 72/100 (Good). Valid 2025.

Name: Kafue Road Bridges – 6-Monthly Structural Safety Inspection
Description: 6-monthly structural safety inspection certificate for 14 bridges on the Kafue Road corridor. Inspected per ZNRA Bridge Inspection Manual 2021. 13 bridges pass, 1 flagged for minor crack monitoring.

Name: Eastern Ring Road Lusaka – Drainage Installation Complete (Phase 1)
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for storm drainage installation on the Eastern Ring Road Phase 1 (12 km). Box culverts, U-drains and catch pits installed. Certified by ZNRA project manager.

Name: Eastern Ring Road Lusaka – Base Course Compaction Complete (Phase 1)
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for base course compaction (CBR ≥ 80%) on Eastern Ring Road Phase 1, 12 km. 100% of test pits pass. Certified by independent geotechnical lab.

Name: Mongu–Kalabo Road – Causeway Construction Milestone
Description: Proof-of-work token for 2.4 km causeway completion across the Western Province floodplain, Mongu–Kalabo Road. Foundation piling, fill and armoured revetment complete. Certified by ZNRA WP regional engineer.

Name: T001 Great North Road – Annual Routine Maintenance Certificate 2024
Description: Annual routine maintenance completion certificate for 780 km T001 Great North Road. Includes pothole patching, vegetation clearing, culvert cleaning, signage replacement. Certified by ZNRA maintenance directorate.

Name: Copperbelt Urban Roads – Emergency Pothole Patching Programme Certificate Q3-2024
Description: Emergency pothole patching programme completion certificate for 340 km of Copperbelt urban roads. 12,400 m² of cold-mix asphalt patching completed. Q3 2024. Certified by ZNRA Copperbelt region.

Name: Ndola–Mufulira Road – New 4-Lane Interchange Delivery at Kansenshi Junction
Description: Delivery certificate for new grade-separated interchange at Kansenshi Junction on the Ndola–Mufulira Road. 4-lane flyover, slip roads, pedestrian footbridges and full signalisation. Certified by ZNRA.

Name: Lusaka–Ndola Dual Carriageway – Final Handover Inspection Certificate
Description: Final handover inspection certificate for the full 327 km Lusaka–Ndola Dual Carriageway. Punch-list closed (94/94 items), pavement QA tests 100% pass rate. Issued by independent verification engineer (GIBB Africa).

Name: Chipata–Lundazi Road – Box Culvert Installation Complete
Description: Milestone completion token for 48 reinforced concrete box culverts installed on Chipata–Lundazi Road upgrade (95 km). Certified by ZNRA Eastern Province regional engineer and independent supervision consultant.

Name: Chipata–Lundazi Road – Surfacing and Road Markings Complete
Description: Milestone completion token for double bituminous seal surfacing and thermoplastic road marking on 95 km Chipata–Lundazi Road. Certified by ZNRA and AfDB project implementation unit.

Name: Southern Province Roads Network – Annual Safety Audit Certificate 2024
Description: Annual road safety audit certificate for 1,240 km Southern Province classified road network. Audited per ZNRA Road Safety Manual. 23 high-risk sites identified; 18 corrective action notices issued. Valid 2025.

Name: Livingstone Tourism Roads – Periodic Maintenance Certificate 2024
Description: Periodic maintenance completion certificate for 84 km Livingstone tourism road network. Includes resealing (38 km), crack sealing, signage and guardrail works. Certified by ZNRA Southern Province engineer.

Name: Kasumbalesa–Chililabombwe Road – 22 km Upgrade Delivery
Description: Delivery certificate for the 22 km Kasumbalesa–Chililabombwe road upgrade, including widening to 7.4 m carriageway, new kerbing and pedestrian walkways. Certified by ZNRA and JICA project unit.

Name: Northern Province Gravel Roads – Routine Grading Certificate Q2-2024
Description: Routine gravel road grading and reshaping certificate for 620 km Northern Province district roads (Q2 2024). 100% of roads graded, 340 km with spot improvement gravelling. Certified by ZNRA Northern region.

Name: Solwezi–Chingola Road – Foundation Piling Complete (Lumwana Bridge)
Description: Milestone completion token for foundation piling (48 piles, 25 m depth) for new Lumwana River Bridge on Solwezi–Chingola Road. Certified by ZNRA and geotechnical supervisor. Contract ZN-2024-SCR.

Name: Serenje–Mpika Road – Post-Flood Damage Assessment Inspection Certificate
Description: Post-flood emergency inspection certificate for 112 km Serenje–Mpika Road after 2024 Luapula flooding. 6 critical sections identified; damage repair scope certified by ZNRA and National Disaster Management Authority.

Name: Mansa–Luwingu Road – 67 km Rehabilitation Delivery
Description: Delivery certificate for 67 km rehabilitation of Mansa–Luwingu Road (M3). Includes full pavement reconstruction, 12 new culverts, slope protection and 18 km gravelling of feeder roads. Certified by ZNRA Luapula region and EU supervising engineer.

Name: Eastern Province Roads – Wet Season Emergency Repairs Certificate Q1-2025
Description: Emergency wet-season road repairs completion certificate covering 18 critical sections across Eastern Province (Chipata, Petauke, Lundazi districts). 4,200 m² hotmix patching, 14 culvert reconstructions. Certified by ZNRA EP region.
